name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: My values aren't for sale
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97697d/2ae112ef/162eccbc/357a3c7d/2838192036/VEsH/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97697d/2ae112ef/162eccbc/357a3c7d/2838192036/VEsE/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
Peter, for nine years, the Citizens United decision has allowed powerful special interests and billionaires to control the system, buying our elections and buying influence in Washington - trying to silence your voices.
But this campaign will be different: no corporate PACs, no federal lobbyists, no super PACs. Your work, your fight and your voices will power us.
If we want 2020 to be different - if we want to restore the promise of one person, one vote - we have to stand up to rampant corruption fueled by special-interest money. That's why I need you to join me right now by asking everyone who runs to join us in rejecting the influence of big money.
**[Tell every candidate running for office to reject money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists and super PACs- and to cease self-funding. It's past time we stand up to the money that corrodes our system and drowns out your voices.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/campaign_finance_reform?firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&source=jtk2687-su-non-abel-nd-test")**
We can't enact true reform until we get dark money out of politics. We have to be willing to take on the insurance companies to get health care for all. We have to take on the NRA to pass lifesaving gun reform. We have to stand up to corporate greed to create quality job opportunities. Right now, we have to stand up to rampant corruption fueled by special-interest money to restore power to the people.
Together, we're going to take on this broken system. I was the first member of Congress to post an online list of my official meetings, earmark requests and personal finance disclosures. I believe you deserve to know - and you've always deserved to know - that my values aren't for sale.
I've never backed down from a fight for what's right, no matter how big or powerful the opponent - and I won't start now. But I need you to join me by asking everyone who runs to join us in rejecting the influence of big money.
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/campaign_finance_reform?firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&source=jtk2687-su-non-abel-nd-test")
Thank you for speaking out.
Kirsten
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97697d/2ae112ef/162eccbc/357a3c7f/2838192036/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
Contributions or gifts to Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee are not tax-deductible. Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs.

But I need you to join me by asking everyone who runs to join us in rejecting the influence of big money. "" Thank you for speaking out. Kirsten

name: Tina Smith
subject: Would you give me a minute to explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
This is brief, I promise.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-january?refcode=rtw_20190126_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team, In a minute, I'm going to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign, but first, let me explain why this is so important. The 2020 election may seem far off, but the truth is we've already run the numbers and figured out how much we need to invest in growing this team early to win re-election. Minnesota was one of the closest states in 2016, and Trump has made clear that it will be one of his top targets in 2020 -- which means we absolutely cannot afford to fall short of our fundraising goals. Trump, GOP leaders, and their big donors will be ready to spend against us, and we need to make sure we're ready. **That 's why I'm personally asking for your help to keep this campaign going strong and help me keep fighting for our Minnesota values. We need to raise $4,335 by tonight to stay on track to hit our January fundraising deadline. Friend, will you chip in $10 or whatever you can right now? Here's a link: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-january](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-january?refcode=rtw_20190126_em&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")** Thank you for being part of this team, Tina | **Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-january?refcode=rtw_20190126_em-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
---

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: You’re invited – come cruise with us!
body:
| | This will be an unforgettable trip.
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FECXgvVBAH18GBWRCy8D9S_H0X-LMKxuVQZOVdM48FB6clUdS6lpIFIKWvxyXp9e2cOQvzJtyDDTF_AeDLkTIA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190126com01nd&n=1)
| Peter, I want to extend an invitation to you to join me on an unforgettable trip to the Baltics August 9 to August 17, 2019! After many years of the Israel Experiences and our most recent trip the Mediterranean Experience cruise, we are bringing you another phenomenal cruise, the Baltic Experience! This all-inclusive cruise will feature some of the most beautiful places in the Baltic Sea, and we will get to travel to and absorb these destinations aboard a luxury cruise ship from the Azamara Cruise line. Together we will visit Stockholm and Visby Sweden, Talinn Estonia, St. Petersburg Russia, Helsinki Finland, and Copenhagen Denmark! If you have traveled with us before, you already know that all-inclusive means exactly that and there are no surprises along the way. The Baltic Experience will be no different. And when the weather is often unbearably hot throughout most of the US in August, we will be enjoying the cool and delightful weather that makes travel in the Baltic region perfect. Once again we have the entire ship and will fill our time on board with spectacular entertainment and special guests. In addition to the cruise, we have multiple pre and post cruise offerings you can choose from to extend your trip. Our last cruise sold out in record time, so we encourage you to get your cabin secured soon if you are able to join us. You can learn more about the exciting trip including all the cruise details and rate information on [The Greatest Trip's website](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FECXgvVBAH18GBWRCy8D9S_H0X-LMKxuVQZOVdM48FB6clUdS6lpIFIKWvxyXp9e2cOQvzJtyDDTF_AeDLkTIA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190126com01nd&n=2). If you have additional questions about the trip after visiting the website, [contact The Baltic Experience team](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FECXgvVBAH18GBWRCy8D9S_H0X-LMKxuVQZOVdM48FBgEtmL7MM07_M1G-_cBmCG&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190126com01nd&n=3). [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FECXgvVBAH18GBWRCy8D9S_H0X-LMKxuVQZOVdM48FB6clUdS6lpIFIKWvxyXp9e2cOQvzJtyDDTF_AeDLkTIA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190126com01nd&n=4) We work tirelessly and do everything in our control to bring you The Greatest Trip. We would love to see you on board!
Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190126com01nd&n=5)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190126com01nd&n=6).
[ ](//www.facebook.com/myfaithvotes) [ ](//www.twitter.com/myfaithvotes) [ ](//www.instagram.com/myfaithvotes)

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: UPDATE: Bernie in 2020
body:
This is YUUGE -- news outlets began reporting last night that Sen. Bernie Sanders will soon announce his plans
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a60d/bed43eb/80166775/75fbc7e9/802721152/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
Friends,
This is YUUGE -- news outlets began reporting last night that Sen. Bernie Sanders will soon announce his plans to run for President of the United States.
****[A $5 donation right now will give Our Revolution's grassroots army a head start if Bernie decides to run. With thousands of people chipping in what they can, we can build a grassroots movement never before seen in American politics.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a60d/bed43eb/80166775/75fbc7e8/802721152/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-run?refcode=em190126-h&noskip=true")****
If Bernie runs -- we will have a presidential candidate who understands that health care must be recognized as a right, not a privilege, for every man, woman, and child in our country, regardless of their income.
If Bernie runs -- we will have a presidential candidate who understands that climate change is real, and if it is not dealt with, we will have devastating effects in the United States and around the world. He will act boldly.
If Senator Bernie Sanders runs for president the opportunity for true transformation -- social, economic, and political -- will be real.
With over 600 groups in every state, Our Revolution is ready to jump-start grassroots organizing to carry Bernie through the primaries all the way to the White House.
If he runs he will need the grassroots to galvanize like never before and help create many moments that will catapult our movement for generations to come.
****[Your $5 donation will help support our organizing work, including the work that would be pivotal in electing Bernie Sanders the next President of the United States...if he decides to run.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a60d/bed43eb/80166775/75fbc7e8/802721152/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-run?refcode=em190126-h&noskip=true")****
Thank you for investing in our movement.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
****[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a60d/bed43eb/80166775/75fbc7e8/802721152/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-run?refcode=em190126-h&noskip=true")****
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a60d/bed43eb/80166775/75fbc7eb/802721152/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a60d/bed43eb/80166775/75fbc7ea/802721152/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a60d/bed43eb/80166775/75fbc615/802721152/VEsB/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a60d/bed43eb/80166775/75fbc614/802721152/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Team Kirsten
subject: The fighter we need
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976973/2ae112ef/164238e1/357a3ec5/4046207878/VEsH/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976973/2ae112ef/164238e1/357a3ec5/4046207878/VEsE/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
Peter - since the day he took office, Donald Trump has turned our government against women, children, immigrants and working families. But Kirsten has taken the lead to fight back at every turn.
**With the strongest anti-Trump record of anyone in the Senate, Kirsten is the fighter we need to take back power for the people and for our communities.** We can bring true reform to the White House, and it starts now by building a campaign that's community-led and fueled by the grassroots, not corporate PACs, federal lobbyists or a super PAC.
To create a movement strong enough to win, we have to do it together. If you're ready to take on Trump and Washington's culture of corruption, give $5 or more right now - anything you can - to join Kirsten in this fight.
**Here's the link to make your first gift now to become a founding member of this movement:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976973/2ae112ef/164238e1/357a3ec4/4046207878/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI2OTktZnItbm9uLWFiZWwtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2699-fr-non-abel-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for your support. We're so glad to have you with us. Let's go!
Team Kirsten
